title: Hoist and Winch Operators
description: Operate or tend hoists or winches to lift and pull loads using power-operated cable equipment.

tasks.text: Move levers, pedals, and throttles to stop, start, and regulate speeds of hoist or winch drums in response to hand, bell, buzzer, telephone, loud-speaker, or whistle signals, or by observing dial indicators or cable marks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Start engines of hoists or winches and use levers and pedals to wind or unwind cable on drums.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Observe equipment gauges and indicators and hand signals of other workers to verify load positions or depths.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate compressed air, diesel, electric, gasoline, or steam-driven hoists or winches to control movement of cableways, cages, derricks, draglines, loaders, railcars, or skips.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Move or reposition hoists, winches, loads and materials, manually or using equipment and machines such as trucks, cars, and hand trucks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select loads or materials according to weight and size specifications.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Signal and assist other workers loading or unloading materials.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Attach, fasten, and disconnect cables or lines to loads, materials, and equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Apply hand or foot brakes and move levers to lock hoists or winches.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Oil winch drums so that cables will wind smoothly.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Climb ladders to position and set up vehicle-mounted derricks.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair, maintain, and adjust equipment, using hand tools.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Tend auxiliary equipment, such as jacks, slings, cables, or stop blocks, to facilitate moving items or materials for further processing.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
